details.productUrlName: Palantir of Orthanc Extended Art Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
At the beginning of your end step, put an influence counter on Palantír of Orthanc and scry 2. Then target opponent may have you draw a card. If that player doesn't, you mill X cards, where X is the
number of influence counters on Palantir of Orthanc, and that player loses life equal to the total mana value of those cards.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
